stdout:
Patched based on `feedback_input.json` by overhauling the collision model in [db/demo_animation_site_2/index.html](C:\Users\William\Desktop\Projects\Genai_2026\db\demo_animation_site_2\index.html).

What I changed:
- Replaced discrete overlap collision with swept time-of-impact CCD (`findSweptCollision` + `resolveCollisionsCCD`) to prevent tunneling, including corner hits.
- Switched bounce response to wall-relative velocity using rotating wall velocity at contact.
- Added tangential friction transfer in collision response (reduces relative slip instead of treating walls as static).
- Removed the previous ad-hoc post-collision velocity injection and tuned physics constants (`restitution`, `friction`) for more stable energy behavior.

I did not run a browser/video replay in this turn, so visual verification is still pending.
